ip_outcome_note: Card name, art, and species confirmed as Deoxys Normal Forme via PokemonTCG.io API (swsh8-120). Internal Pokemon IP — no external crossover risk.

trivia_bullets.text: Holo Rare in Fusion Strike (SWSH8, November 12, 2021), the largest Sword and Shield expansion at 264 base-set cards. The set introduced the Fusion Strike battle style mechanic alongside existing Single Strike and Rapid Strike.

Deoxys (National Pokedex no. 386) introduced in Generation III. Name derives from deoxyribonucleic acid (DNA). Design Easter egg: initial letters of its three debut formes — Defense, Normal, Attack — spell DNA. Central body crystal and chromosome-like silhouette reinforce the double-helix motif.

Deoxys has four distinct formes — Normal, Attack, Defense, Speed — each with meaningfully different base stats. Attack Forme peaks at 504 in both Attack and Special Attack. This Fusion Strike print depicts Normal Forme: the balanced, foundational expression of the species.

Deoxys originated as a space virus whose DNA mutated upon exposure to a laser beam. It appears where auroras are seen — the swirling purple-blue aurora backdrop on this print directly illustrates that Pokedex lore.
"DNA from a space virus mutated and became a Pokemon. It appears where auroras are seen."
